subcodes.first_line: O Rustam! Behold to what depths tyranny and oppression have reached, that a company of angel-natured, fairy-faced souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای رستم ظلم و ستم را ملاحظه کن که بچه پایه رسیده جمعی فرشته خوی پری روی حق
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
